title: ctenium ledermannii
intro: Ctenium ledermannii, also known as Ctenium, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ctenium ledermannii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve wound healing. The herbal preparations of Ctenium ledermannii typically involve making infusions, decoctions, or tinctures from its leaves and stems, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
